summary: D-119 static review complete. Verified (1) aurora gradient applied to /welcome-b2b on both happy-path and error-state <main> elements with old bg-[#0b0e14] removed, (2) invite-submit-btn restyled to indigo-500/rounded-xl/px-5 py-3 with disabled state styling, (3) ProvisioningTracker liveAction branch uses identical indigo-500/rounded-xl styling with Sparkles icon AFTER label, (4) default emerald-pill <a> link UNCHANGED for backwards compat with /platform/register, /billing/success, admin TenantViewer. All three primary CTAs share identical core classes. yarn tsc --noEmit, yarn lint:all, and yarn build all PASS. i18n still at 1455 keys × 4 locales.

welcome_b2b_gradient.happy_path_main: line 131-134: <main className='min-h-screen text-white py-12 px-4' style={{ background: DEFAULT_GRADIENT_CSS }}>
welcome_b2b_gradient.error_state_main: line 73-76: <main className='min-h-screen text-white flex items-center justify-center px-4' style={{ background: DEFAULT_GRADIENT_CSS }}>
welcome_b2b_gradient.old_class_removed: grep for 'bg-[#0b0e14]' in app/welcome-b2b/ returned 0 matches
welcome_b2b_gradient.d119_comment: line 19-20 header comment explains aurora gradient change

cta_classnames_letter_by_letter.invite_submit_btn (line 438): w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-5 py-3 rounded-xl bg-indigo-500 hover:bg-indigo-400 disabled:bg-indigo-500/40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed text-white text-sm font-medium transition-colors
cta_classnames_letter_by_letter.provisioning_tracker_live_action (line 4: w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-5 py-3 rounded-xl bg-indigo-500 hover:bg-indigo-400 text-white text-sm font-medium transition-colors
cta_classnames_letter_by_letter.welcome_b2b_continue_btn (line 188): w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-5 py-3 rounded-xl bg-indigo-500 hover:bg-indigo-400 text-white text-sm font-medium transition-colors
cta_classnames_letter_by_letter.match_assessment: IDENTICAL core classes (w-full, flex, items-center, justify-center, gap-2, px-5, py-3, rounded-xl, bg-indigo-500, hover:bg-indigo-400, text-white, text-sm, font-medium, transition-colors). Only invite-submit-btn adds disabled:bg-indigo-500/40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed per spec — allowed by review_request.
cta_classnames_letter_by_letter.icon_position: All three use icon AFTER label: invite uses Loader2 conditionally before+text, welcome-b2b uses ArrowRight after, ProvisioningTracker live-action uses Sparkles after — consistent with spec.

default_emerald_pill_unchanged.location: ProvisioningTracker.tsx line 438-449 (else branch when liveAction undefined)
default_emerald_pill_unchanged.classes: inline-flex items-center gap-2 h-11 px-5 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-400 text-black text-sm font-semibold transition
default_emerald_pill_unchanged.callers_unaffected: Verified via code path — /platform/register, /billing/success, admin TenantViewer all use ProvisioningTracker WITHOUT liveAction prop, so they hit the default <a> branch.

static_checks.yarn_lint_all: PASS (5 lint passes green: D-077, coverage-matrix, i18n-sync 1455×4, D-078a PII, D-105 dedup)
static_checks.yarn_build: PASS (Done in 24.08s, exit 0). /welcome-b2b/[subdomain] = 2.94 kB, /invite = 4.91 kB, /platform/am-admin/login = 2.94 kB
static_checks.i18n_keys: 1455 keys × 4 languages (no/sv/da/en) — unchanged, no new keys added in D-119 as expected

critical_code_review_comments: All D-119 requirements met. Code is consistent and well-commented. No issues found.

Minor observation (not blocking): invite-submit-btn keeps Loader2 spinner BEFORE the label when submitting, while welcome-b2b uses ArrowRight AFTER the label and ProvisioningTracker live-action uses Sparkles AFTER. Spec allows icon position to differ — this is fine, but if future iterations want full visual symmetry, consider moving the spinner to the end too.
context_for_next_testing_agent: D-119 verified via static analysis only (per user prohibition on yarn dev / E2E browser tests in the kubernetes pod). yarn tsc / lint:all / build all green. All three primary invite-flow CTAs (invite-submit-btn, invite-continue-btn / provisioning-tracker-live-action, welcome-b2b-continue-btn) share identical base styling. Default emerald-pill link in ProvisioningTracker preserved for other callers. Aurora gradient applied to both /welcome-b2b main elements (happy + error). Previous reports: iteration_19.json (D-117), iteration_20.json (D-118).
